ChangeRequest.name: Update the Time past due band Domain
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The Time Past Due Band Domain currently includes the allowed value "<= 30 days", with code 73. For template F 07.01 and F 07.02 of FINREP, we need a more granular allowed value that is described in the Reference Output Layer as "(1d, 30d]", with code 75.
For context, in the Reference Output Layer there is: - Member "[0d, 30d]" (74) that covers "Not past due or past due <= 30 days" - Member "[1d, 30d]" (75) that covers ">= 1 day <= 30 days"
### Contact person @Maria_Manuel.Henriques
### Description of change request Update the Time Past Due Band Domain to include Members: - 75 with the description ">= 1 day <= 30 days" - 1002 with the description "0 days"
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes Time Past Due Band Domain
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
